name: quantum-portfolio-yand
title: Quantum Portfolio Optimization with YAND
description: A hybrid quantitative finance skill that compares three portfolio optimizers on the same return panel: (1) classical convex baseline (SLSQP), (2) quantum-inspired QUBO via dimod + neal simulated annealing, and (3) Yau's Affine-Normal Descent for Mean-Variance-Skewness-Kurtosis (YAND-MVSK, arxiv 2604.25378). Visualizes QUBO matrix, sampling energy landscape, solution distribution, and a three-way efficient-frontier comparison.
author: xiaolongxia

academic_references.title: Yau's Affine Normal Descent: Algorithmic Framework and Convergence Analysis
Yau's Affine-Normal Descent for Large-Scale Unrestricted Higher-Moment Portfolio Optimization
Minimization with the Affine Normal Direction
